I‚Äôm wiring that now so the drag-end path is explicit and the boundary logic stays testable.

I‚Äôm editing the hook layer first. The goal is to centralize reorder behavior into pure helpers so the tests can hit the real same-kind boundary rules, and the nested track DnD can call a single move handler instead of duplicating index math in the component.

The code changes are in. I‚Äôm running a targeted test pass and lint pass now, because T3 is only useful if the helper is actually testable in isolation and T4 touches several typed interfaces that can fail quietly if one layer is missed.
